database module

database.add_course(cid, name, instructor_id=None)[source]

this one add or update a course.

Parameters:

  • cid (str) – Course ID.

  • name (str) – Course name.

  • instructor_id (str, optional) – Instructor assigned to the course, defaults to None.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

database.add_instructor(iid, name, age, email)[source]

This one add or update an instructor.

Parameters:

  • iid (str) – Instructor ID.

  • name (str) – Instructor name.

  • age (int) – Instructor age.

  • email (str) – Instructor email.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

database.add_student(sid, name, age, email)[source]

Add or update a student.

Parameters:

  • sid (str) – Student ID (unique).

  • name (str) – Full name of student.

  • age (int) – Age of student.

  • email (str) – Email address of student.

Raises:

sqlite3.Error – If database operation fails.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

database.backup_db()[source]

this create a backup of the database.

Copies school.db into a file named school_backup.db.

Returns:

Status message confirming the backup.

Return type:

str

database.delete_course(cid)[source]

for delete course and clean up registrations.

Parameters:

cid (str) – Course ID.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

database.delete_registration(sid, cid)[source]

Deletes a student-course registration.

Parameters:

  • sid (str) – Student ID.

  • cid (str) – Course ID.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

database.fetch_students()[source]

Retrieve all students.

Returns:

List of student records as tuples (id, name, age, email).

Return type:

list/tuple

database.get_instructors()[source]

Retrieve all instructors.

Returns:

List of instructor records as tuples (id, name, age, email).

Return type:

list/tuplee

database.get_registrations()[source]

Retrieves all registrations.

Returns:

List of (student_id, course_id) tuples.

Return type:

list/tuple

database.init_db()[source]

This initialize the SQLite database. it creates tables for students, instructors, courses, and registrations if they dont already exist.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

database.list_courses()[source]

this for retrieve all courses.

Returns:

List of course records as tuples (id, name, instructor_id).

Return type:

list/tuple

database.register_student(sid, cid)[source]

this register a student in a course.

Parameters:

  • sid (str) – Student ID.

  • cid (str) – Course ID.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

database.remove_instructor(iid)[source]

this delete an instructor and unassign their courses.

Parameters:

iid (str) – Instructor ID.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

database.remove_student(sid)[source]

this removes a student and clean up registrations.

Parameters:

sid (str) – Student ID to delete.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

database.update_course(cid, name, instructor_id=None)[source]

this update course details.

Parameters:

  • cid (str) – Course ID.

  • name (str) – Updated course name.

  • instructor_id (str, optional) – Updated instructor ID, defaults to None.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

database.update_instructor(iid, name, age, email)[source]

this function update instructor details.

Parameters:

  • iid (str) – Instructor ID.

  • name (str) – Updated name.

  • age (int) – Updated age.

  • email (str) – Updated email.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

database.update_student(sid, name, age, email)[source]

Update student information.

Parameters:

  • sid (str) – Student ID.

  • name (str) – Updated name.

  • age (int) – Updated age.

  • email (str) – Updated email.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None
